tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def open-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "open"}))

(def filtered-prs 
  (filter #(and (> (:additions %) 400) 
                (nil? (:closes_linear %))) 
          open-prs))

(def by-repo (group-by :repo filtered-prs))

(def repo-counts 
  (into {} (map (fn [[repo prs]] [repo (count prs)]) by-repo)))

(def total-count (count filtered-prs))

(def pr-with-most-additions…(+162)
